steps.t: The goose is loose and was last seen in the village of Long Cleeve. You should search for the goose.
The goose is loose and last seen near The Roaring Bull in the village of Long Cleeve. You should search The Roaring Bull for the goose.
The Roaring Bull can be found in the village of Long Cleeve. You should clean up the mess left behind by the goose in The Roaring Bull.
Redahild Goodenough can be found at The Roaring Bull in the village of Long Cleeve. You should talk to Redahild Goodenough in The Roaring Bull.
The silly goose must still be in the village of Long Cleeve. You should exit The Roaring Bull and continue searching for the goose.
The silly goose must still be in the village of Long Cleeve. You should search Long Cleeve and find out where the goose went next.
The blindsided hobbit can be found in the village of Long Cleeve. You should help the blindsided hobbit.
The horrible goose made for the village edge of Long Cleeve. You should search Long Cleeve and find the goose.
The horrible goose made for the village edge of Long Cleeve. You should search the village edge of Long Cleeve for the goose.
The blindsided hobbits' stolen cabbages can be found at the village edge of Long Cleeve. You should collect the stolen cabbages.
The blindsided hobbit can be found in the village of Long Cleeve. You should return the stolen cabbages.
Prunella Goldworthy can be found in the village of Long Cleeve. You should talk to Prunella Goldworthy.
